requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Desert Heat Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及沙漠高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及沙漠高溫降額

summary.en: Chad EV charger projects should apply IEC 61851 safety principles where IEC-aligned equipment is specified. IEC 61851-1 covers conductive EVSE safety requirements; IEC 61851-23 applies to DC fast chargers. Project acceptance should also require enclosure and operating suitability for Chad’s heat and dust conditions, including thermal rise, ingress protection, and derating curves.
summary.zh: 乍得电动汽车充电桩项目若指定IEC体系，应按IEC 61851安全要求执行。IEC 61851-1覆盖传导式EVSE安全要求，IEC 61851-23适用于直流充电桩。项目验收还应要求适应乍得高温粉尘条件的机柜和运行设计，包括温升、IP等级、热降额曲线。
summary.zht: 乍得電動汽車充電樁項目若指定IEC體系，應按IEC 61851安全要求執行。IEC 61851-1覆蓋傳導式EVSE安全要求，IEC 61851-23適用於直流充電樁。項目驗收還應要求適應乍得高溫粉塵條件的機櫃與運行設計，包括溫升、IP等級、熱降額曲線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Chad project-level environmental and serviceability requirements

summary.en: China comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 with GB/T 20234 and GB/T 27930 interfaces. These are useful for Chinese operations planning but are not automatic substitutes for Chad project acceptance where IEC-aligned evidence and climate derating are needed.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口与GB/T 27930通信。该体系适用于中国运营计划，但在乍得项目验收中，未必自动替代IEC证据与高温降额要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234介面與GB/T 27930通訊。該體系適用於中國營運計畫，但在乍得項目驗收中並不自動替代IEC證據與高溫降額要求。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC charging, IEC 60529 enclosure evidence, protective-device ratings, emergency-stop and interlock controls, and heat/dust derating data for long exposure in Chad conditions. Chinese GB/T evidence supports engineering but not final Chad acceptance by itself.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、适用于直流充电桩的IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 60529机柜证据、保护器件额定值、急停与互锁文件，以及乍得高温粉尘长期暴露下的降额数据。中国GB/T证据可支持工程，但不足以独立完成乍得项目验收。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、適用於直流充電樁的IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 60529機櫃證據、保護器件額定值、急停與互鎖文件，以及乍得高溫粉塵長期暴露下的降額數據。中國GB/T證據可支援工程，但不足以獨立完成乍得項目驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly required where IEC 61851 and project operator expectations are used
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T 18487 evidence is a baseline only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use Chinese standards as an engineering baseline and then provide a full IEC 61851-aligned package for Chad project acceptance, including enclosure and climate derating evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国标准用于工程基线，再提供完整IEC 61851对齐的乍得项目验收文件，包括外壳和高温降额证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國標準用於工程基線，再提供完整IEC 61851對齊的乍得項目驗收文件，包括外殼和高溫降額證據。
